item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm glad you liked it. To be honest I had some doubt about that last line at first because I feared it would feel a bit too "cheesy" but it seems people ended liking it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That final line is one of my favorite final lines in an article that I can remember from recent times. The build-up to it was chef's kiss.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Truly, this has been the art piece that made the world speechless. Forever.

Yeah, okay. This is a solid line to end on.

I do appreciate how this article establishes more of a malevolent nature to the countermeme, giving the efforts of the GOC and the anartists a certain "puppets on a string" nature to their actions, even if they unintentionally played to 3432's benefit.

While I agree that this has a certain amount of rehashing of info already established in the rest of the series, the research logs provide enough new content for me to enjoy the article.

+1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
An unexpected event at worked forced me to post this much earlier than I had anticipated in order to meet the deadline and the last round of proof-reading suffered from this (the paragraph formatting issues probably came from copy-pasting piece of final draft from the sandbox to a word document and back to the wiki).

Whatever the reasons, I apologize for posting something that initially failed to meet quality standard and have presently fixed the formatting/syntax/grammar issues I have been able to spot on the page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
There are a lot of typos in this, including paragraphs that aren't spaced right. I get that we're down to the wire on submissions, but it's just not up to the standard set by previous contest articles. You shouldn't need the spaced periods to create whitespace, either.

And even taken on its own merits, it's basically just that other one with the video at the end that does exactly the same thing, much faster and without limitation.
